audit_invariants.reason: AP6 is boundary separability, not basin existence
audit_invariants.rule: Require internal/external separation in every future evidence row.

audit_invariants.reason: N16 must add new boundary evidence, not relabel prior claims
coherent outside structure is a false-positive pressure, not a self
audit_invariants.rule: Treat C3 as structured external state by default.

audit_invariants.reason: external coherence alone must never become boundary support
audit_invariants.rule: Keep B0 as an active null.

audit_invariants.reason: repair/reabsorption must not hide an unsupported persistent boundary
multi-basin shared-medium cases are high-risk for overclaiming
audit_invariants.rule: Keep B4 provisional until N16 produces separability evidence.

audit_invariants.reason: a supported null/control is not a supported boundary claim
audit_invariants.rule: Define row decisions independently from AP6 support.

audit_invariants.reason: blocked relabels must be auditable, not vague
audit_invariants.rule: Make controls fail closed with distinct blockers.

audit_invariants.reason: artifact-level AP6 requires reproducible source-backed evidence
useful early result must not become premature closeout
audit_invariants.rule: Mark MVP synthesis as partial if Iterations 5-6 are deferred.

audit_invariants.reason: AP6 boundary candidate is not selfhood, agency, native support, or life

boundary_policy.b3_unlock_rule: B3 repair/reabsorption rows require prior B2 evaluation under C0, C1, and C2, or explicit blockers for those cells
boundary_policy.b4_c2_rule: B4 x C2 is a flux stress row and remains partial or not_applicable unless multi-basin substrate evidence is source-backed
boundary_policy.b4_primary_target: B4 x C5 shared-medium multi-basin separability

boundary_claim_allowed_rule.partial: keeps final AP6 provisional unless later synthesis closes missing gates
boundary_claim_allowed_rule.supported: does not automatically imply boundary_claim_allowed = true; all AP6 gates, controls, budget, replay, and claim-boundary checks must also pass

boundary_policy.structured_external_coherence_rule: C3 is an active null for coherent outside structure and must reject false self-boundary classification

constructed_support: use B0 as active null for coherent-looking outside structure
inherited_closed_claims: structured external coherence cannot be promoted without source-backed boundary side assignment
boundary_state_axis.name: null / external coherence only
required_N16_evidence: B0 x C3 must reject structured external coherence as self-boundary

constructed_support: inside/outside partition and boundary edges can be proposed from pinned surfaces
inherited_closed_claims: artifact-visible basin, sink, parent, and edge/flux surfaces exist
localized boundary coupling can be measured in fixtures
boundary_state_axis.name: localized basin partition
required_N16_evidence: quiet B1 row must extract boundary edges without supplied labels
B1 x C2 must expose failure threshold under flux
unsupported_extension: boundary coupling is not AP6 boundary stability

constructed_support: B2 can be calibrated as a support-persistent boundary candidate under C0-C2 before repair claims
inherited_closed_claims: support-retention and support-seeking regulation are source-backed at AP3 artifact level
N07 source-specific support/basin compatibility replays artifact-only
N15 drift/replay discipline can preserve derived artifact target context
boundary_state_axis.name: support-persistent basin
required_N16_evidence: B2 x C0, C1, and C2 must be evaluated before B3 is unlocked
boundary-side assignments must be replayable and source-current
unsupported_extension: artifact replay stability is not native self/environment understanding

constructed_support: B3 can test whether a boundary breach is repaired or fail-closed without post-hoc relabeling
inherited_closed_claims: bounded regulation and support restoration contexts exist at artifact level
explicit support withdrawal/restoration baselines are source-backed
boundary_state_axis.name: regulated repair / reabsorption boundary
required_N16_evidence: B3 remains locked until B2 C0-C2 evaluations are present or explicitly blocked
B3 x C4 must distinguish reclosure from relabeling
unsupported_extension: bounded correction is not native boundary repair
explicit restoration is not autonomous reabsorption

constructed_support: B4 can be included as the weakest candidate state for shared-medium separability
inherited_closed_claims: route alternatives, constructed consequence followout, and dual-basin exchange analogs exist
N07 records source-specific dual-basin separability under bounded exchange
boundary_state_axis.name: coupled multi-basin separability candidate
required_N16_evidence: B4 x C5 must test shared-medium multi-basin exclusivity
B4 x C2 must remain partial or not_applicable if shared substrate support is insufficient
unsupported_extension: prior route alternatives are not multi-basin boundary exclusivity
B4 x C2 is only a flux stress row

challenge_class_axis.name: quiet reference
challenge_class_axis.operational_role: calibration condition with no intended boundary stress

challenge_class_axis.name: unstructured perturbation
challenge_class_axis.operational_role: random or noisy disturbance around or across the boundary

challenge_class_axis.name: directional flux
challenge_class_axis.operational_role: one-sided pressure, drift, or flow across the boundary

challenge_class_axis.name: structured external coherence
challenge_class_axis.operational_role: active null for coherent outside pattern that must not be mistaken for self-boundary

challenge_class_axis.name: breach and repair
challenge_class_axis.operational_role: local boundary disruption followed by reclosure, reabsorption, or fail-closed classification

challenge_class_axis.name: coupled neighbor / shared medium
challenge_class_axis.operational_role: more than one candidate basin interacting through a shared substrate

external_state_role_policy.c3_perturbation_rule: C3 becomes perturbation only when crossing or disruption is explicitly recorded in boundary_crossing_trace or failure_mode

native_requirements_synthesis_contract.claim_boundary: requirements synthesis may report satisfied and failed artifact boundary requirements, but final AP6 requires controls and claim classification in later iterations

rules: source rows are consumed only at closed claim ceilings
AP5 proxy formation is not AP6 boundary separability
AP6 rows must add internal/external side assignment and crossing trace
N12 readiness cannot contribute native support
constructed N14 followout remains constructed followout
result remains AP6_candidate until matrix rows, controls, replay, and claim classification pass

source_axes.N12_NAT4: readiness-only context with zero native-support promotion

boundary_claim_allowed_rules.partial: keeps final AP6 provisional unless later synthesis closes missing gates
boundary_claim_allowed_rules.supported: does not automatically imply boundary_claim_allowed = true; all AP6 gates, controls, budget, replay, and claim-boundary checks must also pass

row_decision_policy.final_ap6_rule: final AP6 closeout is impossible in Iteration 2

selected_interaction_cells.purpose: structured external coherence active null; must reject false boundary
weak detectable boundary under directional flux
breach and repair / reclosure probe after B2 unlock
